title: How often is the team in emergency response?
description: Revert, hotfix, and rollback patterns signal delivery stability and process trust.

basis.title: Analysis basis
basis.description: Review the repository branch and configured pattern scope before reading emergency signals.

patterns.title: Emergency patterns
patterns.description: Emergency response every two weeks is a signal to inspect deeper delivery issues.

details.title: Pattern details
details.description: Review the selected emergency pattern for {{pattern}}.
details.noConfiguredSignal: No configured signal was found for this pattern.
details.emptyDescription: Keep the pattern table as the default view and open details only for the row you need to inspect.
details.emptyBody: Select a pattern when you need its configured signal and match count together.
